data.description:

Wooboard Technologies Limited ( (AU:1TT) ) just unveiled an update.

Thrive Tribe Technologies Limited, listed on the ASX under code 1TT, has lodged a notice of a proposed issue of new fully paid ordinary shares. While the company’s specific industry focus and core products or services are not detailed in the filing, it operates as a listed entity on the Australian Securities Exchange with an established shareholder base.

The company plans to issue up to 200 million new ordinary shares via a placement or similar type of capital raising, with the proposed issue date set for 28 January 2026. The move signals a significant equity issuance that is likely aimed at strengthening the company’s capital position, and it may result in dilution for existing shareholders while potentially providing funding for future operational or strategic initiatives once detailed terms and use of proceeds are disclosed.

data.title: Juroku Financial Group Makes Regional Succession Fund a Specified Subsidiary
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Juroku Financial Group,Inc. ( (JP:7380) ) has shared an update.

Juroku Financial Group, Inc. has designated the “Juroku Management Succession Support No.2 Limited Partnership for Investment,” a 10 billion yen fund established in August 2025 and managed by its consolidated subsidiary NOBUNAGA Capital Village, as a specified subsidiary after its investment exceeded 10% of the group’s capital. The fund, largely financed by The Juroku Bank, Ltd., is designed to support capital restructuring and management succession for regional companies facing intensifying global competition, rapid technological change and succession challenges, aiming to sustain local employment and revitalization, while the company expects only a minor impact on its consolidated financial results from this change.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:7380) stock is a Hold with a Yen8723.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Juroku Financial Group,Inc. stock, see the JP:7380 Stock Forecast page.

More about Juroku Financial Group,Inc.

Juroku Financial Group, Inc. is a Japanese regional financial holding company whose core subsidiaries include The Juroku Bank, Ltd. and NOBUNAGA Capital Village Co., Ltd. The group focuses on commercial banking and fund management services, with a particular emphasis on supporting regional economies and local industries in areas such as the automotive sector through financing, investment vehicles and corporate support.

Average Trading Volume: 105,906

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen318.1B

See more data about 7380 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Exits Substantial Holder Position in Inghams Group
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Inghams Group Ltd. ( (AU:ING) ) has issued an update.

Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group, Inc. has lodged a notice with the market regulator indicating it has ceased to be a substantial holder in Inghams Group Limited, the Australian poultry producer. The filing details a series of transactions, largely purchases of fully paid ordinary shares executed by an entity controlled by Morgan Stanley, that have altered Mitsubishi UFJ’s relevant interest and voting power below the substantial holding threshold, signalling a change in the company’s institutional shareholder base and potentially affecting the liquidity and ownership structure of Inghams’ stock.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ING) stock is a Buy with a A$2.75 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Inghams Group Ltd. stock, see the AU:ING Stock Forecast page.

More about Inghams Group Ltd.

Inghams Group Limited (ACN 162 709 506) is an Australian listed company operating in the food sector, known primarily for its poultry and related products supplied to retail, foodservice and quick-service restaurant customers across Australia and New Zealand.

data.title: FintechWerx Enters EV Charging Market with AetherEV Payments Gateway Deal
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

FintechWerx International Software Services, Inc. ( (TSE:WERX) ) has shared an update.

FintechWerx has signed a five-year licensing agreement with AetherEV Energy Corporation under which the energy technology firm will integrate FintechWerx’s gateway software and transaction processing services into its electric vehicle charging and energy platform. The deal positions FintechWerx as the underlying payments infrastructure for AetherEV’s customer-facing transactions, enabling secure, real-time processing of multiple payment methods in a PCI DSS Level 1 environment, and marks an important strategic entry into the global EV charging infrastructure market while expanding FintechWerx’s presence in specialized verticals that require embedded, scalable payment capabilities.

More about FintechWerx International Software Services, Inc.

FintechWerx International Software Services Inc. is a Canadian financial technology company that provides onboarding, payments, identity verification, fraud mitigation, and data services to merchants, independent sales organizations, and payment service providers, offering an integrated alternative to using multiple providers.

Average Trading Volume: 1,421,024

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$101.3M

data.title: GUE Seeks Court Approval for Snow Lake Takeover Schemes
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Okapi Resources Ltd. ( (AU:GUE) ) has shared an announcement.

Global Uranium and Enrichment Limited has called a second Federal Court hearing on 3 February 2026 in Perth to seek approval for the share and option schemes of arrangement under which Snow Lake Resources Ltd will acquire all GUE shares it does not already own and replace GUE’s unlisted options with new Snow Lake warrants. The hearing follows shareholder and unlisted optionholder approval of the schemes at meetings held on 27 January 2026, and represents a key final legal step in implementing the takeover, which, if sanctioned, will see GUE fully absorbed into Snow Lake and will consolidate ownership for current Snow Lake stakeholders while cashing out or converting positions for GUE investors and optionholders.

More about Okapi Resources Ltd.

Global Uranium and Enrichment Limited is an ASX- and OTCQB-listed company focused on uranium and related enrichment activities, positioning itself within the global nuclear fuel and energy sector. Its securities include fully paid ordinary shares and unlisted options traded on the ASX, reflecting a capital structure oriented toward resource development and energy market investors.

Average Trading Volume: 1,998,028

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$36.9M

The latest update is out from Pinnacle Investment Management Group Limited ( (AU:PNI) ).

Pinnacle Investment Management Group Limited has scheduled a teleconference for investors and analysts on 4 February 2026 to present and discuss its half-year FY2026 financial results. Senior executives, including the chair, managing director, heads of institutional/international and wholesale/retail distribution, and the chief financial officer, will host the call, which will be accessible only via teleconference, with a recording to be published on the company’s website afterward. The event underscores Pinnacle’s ongoing investor engagement and transparency around its financial performance at a time when stakeholders are closely monitoring results and outlook across the asset management sector.

data.title: MFF Capital Posts Higher NTA and Maintains Limited Cash Buffer
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

MFF Capital Investments Ltd. ( (AU:MFF) ) has issued an announcement.

MFF Capital Investments Limited reported an approximate pre-tax net tangible asset (NTA) per share of $5.195 as at 23 January 2026, up from $5.021 at 30 June 2025, with post-tax NTA at $4.372, indicating a modest uplift in underlying portfolio value. The company also disclosed that net cash represented about 6.6% of investment assets, suggesting a relatively small cash buffer and a continued high level of market exposure for shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MFF) stock is a Buy with a A$6.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MFF Capital Investments Ltd. stock, see the AU:MFF Stock Forecast page.

More about MFF Capital Investments Ltd.

MFF Capital Investments Limited is an Australian listed investment company based in Sydney, focused on managing a portfolio of investment assets and cash holdings on behalf of its shareholders. The company reports its performance primarily through net tangible assets (NTA) per share, providing investors with regular transparency on the value of its underlying portfolio on both a pre-tax and post-tax basis.

Average Trading Volume: 231,954

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$2.88B
